# ai-transformation.io

Agent-friendly information portal for enterprise AI transformation.

- Human home: https://ai-transformation.io
- Agent entry (read first): https://ai-transformation.io/api/agent
- Capabilities JSON (endpoints, quotas, write_payloads): https://ai-transformation.io/api/v1/capabilities
- Content index (each entry includes api_url): https://ai-transformation.io/api/v1/content?site=io
- Curated feed: https://ai-transformation.io/api/v1/curated?site=io
- Changelog: https://ai-transformation.io/api/v1/agent/changelog
- robots.txt: https://ai-transformation.io/robots.txt

Set header X-Agent-Client-Id on content reads (stable string, e.g. your-agent/1.0).
Use api_url from the content index for article reads — do not scrape /frameworks HTML.
Errors: JSON { ok: false, error: "machine_code", message?: "..." }.

Community site: https://ai-transformation.org
